zh.lifeSummary: 當Trahaearn ap Iorwerth於1160年出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾加斯米爾時，他的父親Iorwerth ap Einion ap Rhys Goch21歲，母親Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradog16歲。他和Dyddgu verch Maredudd of Cedewain至少有6個兒子和3個女兒。他去世在英國威爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Trahaearn ap Iorwerth于1160年出生在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾加斯米爾时，他的父亲Iorwerth ap Einion ap Rhys Goch21岁，母亲Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradog16岁。他和Dyddgu verch Maredudd of Cedewain至少有6个儿子和3个女儿。他去世在英国威尔斯。

nameMeanings.name: Trahaearn

meanings: Traditional: composed of the intensive prefix tra- + haearn ‘iron’.

variants.name: Traherne
meanings: Traditional: composed of the intensive prefix tra- + haearn ‘iron’.

meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Trahaearn ap Iorwerth was born in 1160, in Garthmyl, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Iorwerth ap Einion ap Rhys Goch, was 21 and his mother, Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradog, was 16. He had at least 6 sons and 3 daughters with Dyddgu verch Maredudd of Cedewain. He died in Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Trahaearn ap Iorwerth est né en 1160, à Garthmyl, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Iorwerth ap Einion ap Rhys Goch, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradog, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles avec Dyddgu verch Maredudd of Cedewain. Il est décédé à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Trahaearn ap Iorwerth 1160 in Garthmyl, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Iorwerth ap Einion ap Rhys Goch 21 und seine Mutter Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradog 16. Er hatte mit Dyddgu verch Maredudd of Cedewain mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Trahaearn ap Iorwerth è nato il nel 1160 nel Garthmyl, Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Iorwerth ap Einion ap Rhys Goch, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradog, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie con Dyddgu verch Maredudd of Cedewain. Morì nel Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Trahaearn ap Iorwerthが1160年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアガースムイルで生まれた時，父Iorwerth ap Einion ap Rhys Gochは21歳，母Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradogは16歳であった。彼はDyddgu verch Maredudd of Cedewainとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼はイギリスウェールズで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Trahaearn ap Iorwerth(이)가 1160년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 가스미에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Iorwerth ap Einion ap Rhys Goch(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradog(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Dyddgu verch Maredudd of Cedewain(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 웨일스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Trahaearn ap Iorwerth nasceu em 1160, em Garthmyl, Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Iorwerth ap Einion ap Rhys Goch, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradog, tinha 16 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Trahaearn ap Iorwerth родился в 1160 г. в местности гартмил, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Iorwerth ap Einion ap Rhys Goch было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradog, 16. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери от Dyddgu verch Maredudd of Cedewain. Он умер в местности Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Trahaearn ap Iorwerth nació en 1160, en Garthmyl, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Iorwerth ap Einion ap Rhys Goch, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Sian ferch Dafydd Fychan ap Dafydd ap Ieuan ap Trahaearn ap Caradog, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas con Dyddgu verch Maredudd of Cedewain. Murió en Gales, Reino Unido.
